title: Jude, Chapter 1
description: Complete text of Jude chapter 1 from the King James Version (1611).
introduction: Complete text of Jude chapter 1 from the King James Version (1611).

translation.text:
<sup>1</sup>Jude, the servant of Jesus Christ, and brother of James, to them that are sanctified by God the Father, and preserved in Jesus Christ,
and
